message:
refactor: apply clippy lints and minor code improvements

Clean up various modules based on clippy suggestions:

- browser/bootstrap.rs: Minor formatting
- browser/openai_device.rs: Improved error handling
- config.rs: Add new configuration fields and defaults
- ipc.rs: Remove unused import
- learn.rs: Refactor for cleaner error handling and organization
- lib.rs: Fix module visibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
